stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced a breakthrough in quantum-AI hybrid chips, promising 10x efficiency gains. Economically, this accelerates AI adoption across industries, boosting capex from hyperscalers. Market psychology: FOMO among retail and institutions, reminiscent of 2023 AI boom. Historical parallel: Similar to GPU surge post-Crypto winter. Analogies: Like discovering oil in AI desert; turbocharging the AI engine.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches reveal positive analyst upgrades from Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley post-announcement. X sentiment (semantic search on 'NVDA AI chip', 20 latest posts): 85% bullish, high engagement on CEO demo video. Expected earnings beat amplifies.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy for 10-15% upside in 1 week; target $160.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or cover if holding; potential squeeze.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Overvaluation bubble burst if macro slowdown; competition from AMD/Intel.

stocks.justification: Strong news catalyst, uniform positive sentiment across sources, historical precedent.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla received regulatory nod for unsupervised FSD in California. Implications: Robotaxi revenue stream unlocks $1T TAM. Psychology: Elon hype cycle reignites retail frenzy. Parallel: 2020 EV subsidy boom. Analogies: Green light for autonomous highway; Tesla as Uber on steroids.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X keyword search ('TSLA FSD approval' since:2026-04-24, latest 20): 90% positive, viral Musk post 50k likes. News: Reuters/CNBC coverage bullish on valuation re-rate.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory reversal in other states; production delays.

stocks.justification: High sentiment but execution risks; strong short-term momentum.

stocks.impact_theory: Apple unveiled Vision Pro 2 with AI integration, but supply chain delays announced. Economic: Premium device sales boost but margins pressure. Psychology: Buy-the-dip after initial selloff. Parallel: iPhone 12 5G hype-dip. Analogies: Stumble on AR runway; polishing the halo product.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web news: Bloomberg reports China factory strikes. X sentiment (20 posts): 60% bearish on delays, memes mocking headset.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Surprise supply fix; broader tech rally.

stocks.justification: Mixed signals, but delays tangible; sentiment leaning negative.

stocks.impact_theory: Meta's Llama 4 model tops benchmarks, partnering with AWS. Implications: AI monetization accelerates ad targeting. Psychology: Validation after OpenAI feud. Parallel: FB ad rebound post-IPO. Analogies: AI wizard in social castle; upgrading the feed algorithm.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Searches show TechCrunch exclusive; X buzz positive, influencers praising open-source move.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory scrutiny on AI data use; capex overrun.

stocks.impact_theory: Intel missed Q1 guidance due to foundry losses. Implications: US chip subsidies questioned. Psychology: Capitulation selling. Parallel: 2018-2020 turnaround fail. Analogies: Foundry anchor dragging ship; chips with training wheels off.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings call transcripts via search bearish; X threads on layoffs, 70% negative.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: CHIPS Act bailout; activist investor push.

stocks.justification: Ongoing issues, but turnaround potential uncertain.
